name: Dried Fruit-Rice Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Turkey stock or Chicken bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onions, celery, and parsley to the skillet.
3. Cook until the onions are translucent, about 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and transfer the mixture to a large bowl.
5. Stir in marjoram, thyme, sage, salt, and pepper.
6. Mix well with cooked brown rice.
7. Add eggs, turkey stock or chicken bouillon, and dried fruit.
8. Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
9. This stuffing will yield enough for a 14-pound turkey.
